main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'mechanical failure high-pressure head seal O-ring end cap pressure vessel #2' literal.

alternatives.justification: 3 alts brief (FRP shell crack, permeate tube O-ring, OXID).

recommended_action.justification: Isolate + LOTO + replace head O-rings + permeate port seals + inspect grooves — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide dye penetrant test internal sealing groove FRP — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: dye test reveals structural crack FRP → switch.
